name: WPP plc (Young & Rubicam)
description: WPP plc is a British multinational creative transformation company headquartered in London, England. It operates as a global holding company providing a comprehensive range of services, including advertising, public relations, media intelligence, technology, and commerce solutions. By combining world-class creativity with data-driven insights and transformative enterprise technology, WPP partners with many of the world’s leading brands to drive growth and innovation. The company manages a vast network of agencies that deliver integrated marketing and communications strategies to national and multinational clients across diverse industries worldwide.
